task_completion.description: Navigate to the Web-to-Lead form generation page in SuiteCRM
task_completion.visual_evidence: SuiteCRM interface showing the 'Create Person Form' or 'Web To Lead Form' wizard.

task_completion.description: Select the required fields for the form
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form wizard showing 'First Name', 'Last Name', and 'Email Address' in the selected fields column or area.

task_completion.description: Configure the Redirect URL and Assigned To properties
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form wizard showing the Redirect URL field filled with 'https://www.meridian-tech.com/digital-catalog' and the Assigned To field set to 'admin'.

task_completion.description: Generate the HTML form in SuiteCRM
task_completion.visual_evidence: SuiteCRM displaying the generated HTML code in a text area or a success screen indicating the form was generated.

task_completion.description: Save the generated HTML code to the specified file path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, file manager, or terminal showing the file '/home/ga/Documents/tradeshow_lead_form.html' being created or saved with the HTML code.

integrity.description: The agent used the SuiteCRM web interface to generate the form
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the SuiteCRM web application to configure and generate the form, rather than writing the HTML manually from scratch in a text editor.

integrity.description: The generated HTML code contains SuiteCRM-specific elements
integrity.visual_evidence: The HTML code visible in the text editor or SuiteCRM output should contain 'WebToLeadCapture' and internal field names like 'first_name', 'last_name', and 'email1'.

integrity.description: The file is saved in the correct location
integrity.visual_evidence: The file path '/home/ga/Documents/tradeshow_lead_form.html' should be clearly visible in the text editor's title bar, save dialog, or terminal command.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file path is /home/ga/Documents/tradeshow_lead_form.html. The requested redirect URL is https://www.meridian-tech.com/digital-catalog. The generated HTML must contain the SuiteCRM 'WebToLeadCapture' entrypoint and the internal field names for first name (first_name), last name (last_name), and email (email1).
